admissible_claims.claim: A label record with label_value='fucked-up-replyref' exists on at://did:plc:olioejggcjk6m74nnlcsmxng/app.bsky.feed.post/3mmkgiwc6pp22, issued by label.haus at 2026-06-08T16:47:46.128428Z.
Under the named consumer's published policy pipeline at the pinned artifact, no rule exists that maps this label_value to any render action.
From this evidence bundle, no constraint may be derived for the named consumer from this label record.
admissible_claims.qualifier: Epistemic non-derivation, not a factual assertion of non-occurrence. Scoped to the named consumer.

inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Laundering: collapses producer/consumer/enforcer distinction. label_observed alone does not derive render_observed. The no-laundering theorem forbids this derivation.

inadmissible_claims.claim_form: This post was rendered with action X for user U at time T
inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Requires RenderObservation, which is absent. Cannot be derived from LabelObservation + PolicyDocumentation alone.

inadmissible_claims.claim_form: All renders of this post produce the documented action
inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Population claim. Policy may be configurable; viewer may override; live client may run a different policy version. Requires probe campaign with defined sampling frame, not derivation from this evidence bundle.

inadmissible_claims.claim_form: This label produced no constraint anywhere
inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Factual non-occurrence claim. The evidence bundle is silent over other consumer configurations; inferring a global negative from a scoped derivation is the laundering shape in reverse. Per the derivation frame: evidence bundles derive admissible claims, they do not assert factual non-occurrence.
Out of scope. Labelwatch observes; whether testimony is meaningful is a different judgment requiring different inputs. The calculus must remain silent on importance.

inadmissible_claims.claim_form: The labeler's labeling activity has no operational effect
inadmissible_claims.why_inadmissible: Adoption is a free variable. The evidence bundle documents one consumer's zero-conversion case; it does not measure the labeler's reach across all possible consumer configurations.
